# ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind

**Enumeration**

These constants specify the possible kinds of distinguished playlists.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind
```

## Distinguished Playlist Kinds

- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindNone**: The playlist isn’t a distinguished playlist.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMovies**: The playlist contains all the movies in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindTVShows**: The playlist contains all the TV shows in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMusic**: The playlist contains all the music items in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindAudiobooks**: The playlist contains all the audiobooks in the iTunes library.
- **kindBooks**: The playlist contains all the audiobooks in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindRingtones**: The playlist contains all the iOS ringtones in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindPodcasts**: The playlist contains all the podcasts in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindVoiceMemos**: The playlist contains all the voice memos in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindPurchases**: The playlist contains all the user’s purchases from the iTunes Store.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindiTunesU**: The playlist contains all the user’s iTunes U items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kind90sMusic**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s music from the 1990s.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMyTopRated**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s top rated media items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindTop25MostPlayed**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s 25 most played media items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindRecentlyPlayed**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s most recently played media items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindRecentlyAdded**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s most recently added media items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMusicVideos**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s music videos.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindClassicalMusic**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s classical music.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindLibraryMusicVideos**: The playlist contains all the music videos in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindHomeVideos**: The playlist contains all the user’s home videos in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindApplications**: The playlist contains all the user’s iOS apps in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindLovedSongs**: The playlist contains all the user’s loved music.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMusicShowsAndMovies**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s music shows and movies.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Getting Playlist Info

- **name**: The name or title of the playlist.
- **items**: The media items (tracks) in the playlist.
- **parentID**: The unique persistent identifier of the playlist’s parent playlist.
- **isPrimary**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist is the primary playlist.
- **isVisible**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist is visible to the user in iTunes.
- **distinguishedKind**: An indication of whether the playlist has a special distinction.
- **kind**: An indication of the type of playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistKind**: These constants specify the possible kinds of playlists.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
